/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/encodebasis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/encodewebp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/fileio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/gltfpack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/parseobj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/parselib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/parsegltf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gltfpack.dir/gltf/write.cpp.o -o gltfpack  libmeshoptimizer.a basisu/libbasisu_encoder.a libwebp/libwebp.a libwebp/libsharpyuv.a -lm
